title: coreopsis monticola
intro: Coreopsis monticola, also known as Mountain Tickseed, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the family Asteraceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties that can help soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Coreopsis monticola include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestive health, and boost the immune system, making it a valuable herb for treating various health conditions. Coreopsis monticola can be prepared as an herbal tea, infused oil, or tincture to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
